description: CompositionBrown Top made of blended fabric, has a V-neck with a notched collar extending to the chest and long sleeves with buttoned cuffsFitRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDry inside outDo not bleachDo not wringUse warm ironCapture the fun of a new season in fashion with this stylish Top from femella.
